name: KPV
subtitle: Anti-Inflammatory Tripeptide | Alpha-MSH Fragment
overview: KPV is a potent anti-inflammatory tripeptide derived from the C-terminal of alpha-MSH. It exhibits remarkable anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties without the pigmentation effects of full α-MSH, making it ideal for inflammation management.
mechanism: Enters cells and inhibits inflammatory pathways at the nuclear level, particularly NF-κB signaling. Reduces pro-inflammatory cytokines (TNF-α, IL-6) without causing immunosuppression like steroids.

items.name: Systemic Inflammation
items.description: Reduces TNF-α and IL-6 through NF-κB pathway inhibition.

items.name: Autoimmune Modulation
items.description: May help balance overactive immune responses in autoimmune conditions.

items.name: Joint Inflammation
items.description: Potential benefits for inflammatory arthritis through cytokine reduction.

items.name: IBD Support
items.description: Demonstrated benefit in Crohn's disease and ulcerative colitis models.

items.name: Microbiome Balance
items.description: Selective antimicrobial activity preserves beneficial gut bacteria.

items.name: Psoriasis/Dermatitis
items.description: Topical KPV reduced psoriatic markers by 60% and improved skin barrier function.

items.name: Skin Inflammation
items.description: Reduces inflammatory skin conditions without systemic effects.

deliveryMethods.overview: Subcutaneous injection provides systemic anti-inflammatory effects. Abdomen is preferred for gut-related issues.

steps: Solution should be clear and colorless

keyBenefits: Abdomen (preferred for gut issues), thigh, upper arm

deliveryMethods.overview: Oral administration provides direct gut exposure for intestinal conditions.

protocols.route: Mix in water/juice or enteric capsules

deliveryMethods.overview: Topical cream/gel for localized skin inflammation without systemic absorption.
Nasal spray with limited data. May provide systemic effects through nasal absorption.

interactions.notes: Enhanced gut healing and anti-inflammatory effects through complementary mechanisms.
Different mechanisms; can be combined safely.
Both support immune function through different pathways.
Synergistic for skin health and regeneration.
Both are α-MSH related; KPV lacks pigmentation effects but monitor for cumulative effects.

timeline.effects: Subtle reduction in inflammation, improved energy
Improved gut function (if applicable), reduced pain/swelling
Sustained benefits, improved quality of life

common: Minimal to no side effects reported
Does not cause immunosuppression like steroids
stopSigns: Signs of infection (fever, chills) - very rare

warning: pH should be 5.5-7 for optimal stability

references.title: Dissection of the Anti-Inflammatory Effect of the Core and C-Terminal (KPV) Alpha-Melanocyte-Stimulating Hormone Peptides
references.authors: Getting, S.J., Schiöth, H.B., Perretti, M.
references.journal: Journal of Pharmacology and Experimental Therapeutics
references.keyFindings: Established that KPV exerts anti-inflammatory effects distinct from core MSH peptides, likely through inhibition of IL-1β functions rather than melanocortin receptor signaling.

references.title: PepT1-Mediated Tripeptide KPV Uptake Reduces Intestinal Inflammation
references.keyFindings: KPV is transported into cells via PepT1, where nanomolar concentrations inhibit NF-κB and MAP kinase signaling pathways. Oral KPV reduced DSS- and TNBS-induced colitis in mice.

references.title: Melanocortin-Derived Tripeptide KPV Has Anti-Inflammatory Potential in Murine Models of Inflammatory Bowel Disease
references.keyFindings: KPV showed significant anti-inflammatory effects in DSS colitis and CD45RBhi transfer colitis models, reducing weight loss, histological damage, and MPO activity. Effects partially independent of MC1R signaling.

references.title: Critical Role of PepT1 in Promoting Colitis-Associated Cancer and Therapeutic Benefits of KPV
references.journal: Cellular and Molecular Gastroenterology and Hepatology
references.keyFindings: PepT1 is highly expressed in human colorectal tumors. PepT1-transported KPV prevented colitis-associated carcinogenesis in wild-type mice, with no effect in PepT1-knockout mice, confirming PepT1-dependent therapeutic mechanism.

references.title: Orally Targeted Delivery of Tripeptide KPV via Hyaluronic Acid-Functionalized Nanoparticles Efficiently Alleviates Ulcerative Colitis
references.keyFindings: HA-functionalized KPV nanoparticles (~272.3 nm) successfully targeted colonic epithelial cells and macrophages, exerting combined mucosal healing and anti-inflammatory effects superior to free KPV in a UC mouse model.

latestResearch.title: KPV and Rapamycin Self-Assembled Nanodrug for Vascular Calcification
latestResearch.summary: KPV and rapamycin self-assembled into carrier-free nanoparticles that significantly inhibited vascular calcification in mice by suppressing inflammation and activating autophagy.

latestResearch.title: PepT1-Targeted Nanodrug for Combined Treatment of DSS-Induced Colitis
latestResearch.summary: Novel PepT1-targeted nanodrug combining anti-inflammatory KPV peptide and immunosuppressant for combined treatment of acute and chronic colitis models.

latestResearch.title: Peptide-Based Therapeutic and Delivery Strategies for IBD: Challenges and Future Directions
latestResearch.summary: Comprehensive review covering KPV among advanced peptide-based therapeutics and delivery strategies for inflammatory bowel disease treatment.

quickStats.frequency: 1-2 times daily (once for maintenance, twice for active inflammation)
quickStats.storage: Lyophilized: Room temperature. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, refrigerate immediately
